# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React TypeScript frontend application built with Vite, serving as the user interface for a comprehensive HR management system. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Key Architectural Patterns
- **Component Composition**: Extensive use of reusable UI components from shadcn/ui library
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic abstracted into custom hooks for state management and side effects
- **Route-based Pages**: Page components organized under `/pages` directory
- **Feature-based Organization**: Components grouped by domain (attendance, leave, payroll, etc.)
- **Utility Functions**: Shared business logic in `/lib` directory

### State Management
- Local component state with React hooks
- Context providers for global state (authentication, notifications)
- Supabase real-time subscriptions for live data updates
- No external state management library (Redux/Zustand) - kept simple with React's built-in tools

## Core Technologies & Frameworks

### Frontend Stack
- **React 18**: Modern React with concurrent features
- **TypeScript**: Strict type checking throughout the codebase
- **Vite**: Fast build tool and development server
- **React Router**: Client-side routing
- **Tailwind CSS**: Utility-first CSS framework
- **shadcn/ui**: High-quality component library built on Radix UI

### Backend Integration
- **Supabase**: PostgreSQL database with real-time capabilities
- **Supabase Auth**: Authentication and authorization
- **Supabase Storage**: File uploads (avatars, documents)
- **Supabase Edge Functions**: Serverless functions for complex business logic

### Development Tools
- **ESLint**: Code linting and formatting
- **Vitest**: Unit testing framework
- **Playwright**: End-to-end testing
- **TypeScript Compiler**: Type checking

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap, renders root App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Landing/dashboard page

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and header
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with user menu and notifications
- `src/components/MandatoryPasswordChange.tsx`: Modal for first-time password setup
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with multiple variants

### Business Logic Components
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceSummary.tsx`: Complex analytics dashboard for attendance data
- `src/components/employee-profile/`: Tab-based employee profile management
- `src/components/leave/`: Leave request and balance management
- `src/components/payroll/`: Payroll processing and history
- `src/components/settings/`: Administrative configuration panels

### Utility Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission checking functions
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Attendance-specific formatting
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending logic
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system

### Configuration Files
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS customization
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript compiler options
- `eslint.config.js`: ESLint rules
- `supabase/config.toml`: Supabase project configuration

## Database Schema Insights

Based on the migration files, the system manages:

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with auth integration
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company data
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking data
- **leave_requests**: Leave management
- **payroll_records**: Salary and overtime data
- **evaluations**: Performance review system
- **projects**: Project management
- **departments**: Organizational structure

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies
- Attendance records link employees to time entries
- Leave requests have approval workflows
- Payroll calculations include overtime and allowances
- Evaluations are scheduled and tracked over time

## Authentication & Authorization

### Auth Flow
1. Users authenticate via Supabase Auth
2. New users get temporary passwords
3. First login requires password change
4. JWT tokens manage session state
5. Role-based permissions control feature access

### Permission Levels
- **Admin**: Full system access
- **Manager**: Department/team management
- **Employee**: Self-service features
- **HR**: HR-specific functionalities

## Component Patterns

### UI Components (shadcn/ui)
- Consistent design system
- Accessible components built on Radix UI
- Customizable via CSS variables
- Dark/light mode support

### Business Components
- Data fetching with error handling
- Loading states and empty states
- Form validation and submission
- Real-time data updates via Supabase subscriptions

### Custom Hooks
- `useAuth`: Authentication state
- `useToast`: Notification system
- `useSort`: Table sorting logic
- Domain-specific hooks for data operations

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- Feature-based component grouping
- Shared utilities in `/lib`
- Type definitions alongside components
- Consistent naming conventions

### Testing Strategy
- Unit tests for utility functions
- Component testing with Vitest
- E2E testing with Playwright
- Focus on critical user flows

### Build Process
- Vite handles bundling and optimization
- TypeScript compilation
- Asset optimization and code splitting
- Environment variable injection

## Performance Considerations

- Component lazy loading for route-based code splitting
- Supabase real-time subscriptions for live updates
- Optimized re-renders with React.memo where appropriate
- Efficient data fetching with proper loading states
- Image optimization and lazy loading

## Deployment

- Built as static SPA
- Served via CDN or static hosting
- Environment-specific configuration
- Supabase handles backend scaling
- Real-time features work across deployments

This architecture supports a scalable, maintainable HR management system with modern web development practices.
